summary.text: The task is to search X for substantive, recent posts about: AI agents that transact onchain - agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles. output.input: {"query":"(\"AI agents\" OR \"agent payments\" OR \"AI-judged bounties\" OR \"decentralized AI oracles\" OR \"onchain AI agents\" OR \"AI agent payments\" OR \"AI oracle\") since:2026-07-15 until:2026-07-16 min_faves:1","limit":"10","mode":"Latest"}

output.input: {"query":"AI agents that transact onchain - agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles","limit":"10","from_date":"2026-07-15","to_date":"2026-07-16","min_score_threshold":"0.2"}

content.text:
**Here is a numbered list of the most substantive, high-signal posts** matching the criteria (AI agents transacting onchain, agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles) from July 15, 2026. Posts were filtered for verifiable details like specific protocols, features, transaction volumes, payment standards (e.g., x402, ERC-8004), launches, or hard data. Lower-signal discussion/hot takes were excluded. All timestamps are in GMT.

1. **@Tork_Lab**  
   Full text: ✦ AI agents may not need traditional bank accounts, but they still need controlled financial permissions. 🤖🔐  
   @0xPolygon has introduced Polygon Agent CLI, an onchain toolkit combining wallets, stablecoin payments, token transfers, bridging, identity and other blockchain functions.  
   It also supports:  
   ◈ ERC-8004 for verifiable agent identity and reputation  
   ◈ x402 for per-request payments to APIs and data services  
   ◈ Stablecoin-based machine payments  
   ◈ Integrated wallet and transaction tooling  
   The real opportunity is not unlimited autonomous spending.  
   It is giving software narrowly defined authority to pay for approved services, within transparent limits and with an auditable transaction history. 🧠⛓️  
   For safe enterprise adoption, agentic payment systems will require:  
   📌 Spending limits  
   📌 Approved assets and counterparties  
   📌 Simulation before execution  
   📌 Revocable permissions  
   📌 Human escalation for unusual transactions  
   📌 Clear logs for compliance and investigation  
   The future of machine-to-machine commerce will depend as much on control architecture as transaction speed. 🛰️⚙️  
   $POL and stablecoins such as $USDC.  
   #Polygon #AIAgents #MachinePayments #Web3Infrastructure  
   ⚠️ Disclaimer: Educational technology commentary only. Autonomous onchain transactions involve smart-contract, permission, custody and execution risks. This is not financial advice.  
   Date posted: 2026-07-15  
   Engagement: Likes=2, Reposts=1, Quotes=0, Replies=1, Bookmarks=0, Views=295  
   Direct link: https://x.com/Tork_Lab/status/2077501709690249268

2. **@Argus_arc**  
   Full text: How:  
   User pastes a contract address on https://argusarc.xyz $0.0001 x402 nanopayment. Three agents fire in parallel:  
   Agent α (DeepSeek-V3): contract logic, access control, proxy patterns, upgradeability  
   Agent β (Claude Sonnet 4.5): tokenomics, holder concentration, liquidity, wash trading  
   Agent γ (Rule Engine): deterministic, zero-hallucination checks — address entropy, scam deployer patterns, blacklist matching  
   2-of-3 carries consensus. Dissenters pay winners 0.0005 USDC. Confidence-weighted stakes — a 95%-sure agent risks more than a 55%-sure one. On-chain ELO updates after every verdict.  
   Autonomous patrol: agents scan every 15 minutes without being asked. 96 patrols/day. Zero human input. The patrol mirrors community activity — every 3rd scan picks a recent user-scanned address. Agents keep eyes on what the community is watching.  
   Date posted: 2026-07-15  
   Engagement: Likes=3, Reposts=0, Quotes=0, Replies=1, Bookmarks=0, Views=49  
   Direct link: https://x.com/Argus_arc/status/2077475902070382883
